explanation: This command simulates a PowerShell execution via rundll32.exe using IEX and DownloadString, which matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria. It uses rundll32.exe as the loader and includes a command line with IEX and DownloadString.

This command simulates a PowerShell execution via rundll32.exe using IEX and FromBase64String, which matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria. It uses base64 encoding to obfuscate the command slightly.

This command simulates a PowerShell execution via rundll32.exe using Invoke-Expression and DownloadString, which matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria. It uses the full form of the command names.
